name: Doombringer / Chastity Cage
description:
⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

He was being WAY too hump-y so you had to put his ass in the chastity cage!

He is… NOT happy about this decision!

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Pic taken by me in Catalog Avatar Creator

Hope you guys like the personality for Doombringer!

He’s an ex-super moderator in this, having been let go for his trigger-happiness when it came to banning, terminating, and warning people! Also I forget the comment but it mentioned mods and super mods needing to be physically fit, or that it’s a much more physical job than the pencil pushing admins!

Basically, (not that it matters) but Doombringer literally kept having this predator instinct be activated (almost like someone’s idea for guest 666 being docile outside of rounds versus hostile in rounds) and he’d basically drag the person’s ass back to the HQ being all happy and proud of his catch of a “criminal”

More lore… he’s a “Hellion” and a hellion mostly embodies one of the seven deadly sins, and he got greed, and that’s an excuse to integrate some “dragon” qualities in him, like hoarding “loot” he finds, and that also played into the reason he was so ban-happy, that he wanted as many bans as possible under his belt

Psst also take this (unfinished) doombringer drawing,,,, ok…? ok…
